resume.summary: Resourceful and entrepreneurial B.Tech student with cross-functional exposure to operations, strategy, and product. Comfortable working in fast-paced, ambiguous environments and driving projects end-to-end. Seeking a Founder's Office Internship to support strategic initiatives directly with leadership.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology — Computer Science & Engineering
education.school: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Entrepreneurship, Product Management, Business Strategy, Data Structures, Operations Research

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Strategic Research, Operations, Process Design, Cross-functional Coordination
Stakeholder Communication, Market Analysis, Project Management

experience.title: Founder's Office Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Worked directly with the founders to research market expansion opportunities across 3 verticals.
Streamlined the internal hiring process, reducing average time-to-hire by 25%.
Built operational dashboards used by leadership for weekly review meetings.
Researched and proposed a go-to-market plan for a student-led startup, presented to mentors.
Conducted 30+ user interviews to validate product-market fit assumptions.
Mapped and redesigned a club's event-planning workflow, cutting coordination time by 35%.
Documented SOPs adopted by future organising committees.
Co-built a business plan and pitch deck for a campus startup competition, reaching the finals.
Modeled unit economics and a 12-month financial projection.

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
